ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account type */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (active, inactive, frozen, closed) */,
  "account_opening_branch" TEXT /* Branch where the account was opened */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "next_statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the next statement */,
  "overdraft_limit" REAL /* Overdraft limit for the account */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Current interest rate for the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "source_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source account (if applicable) */,
  "destination_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination account (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference for the transaction */,
  "transaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the transaction was made (e.g., online, mobile, branch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_destination_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the credit card */,
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card type */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the credit card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  "cvv" TEXT /* CVV number */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the card */,
  "available_credit" REAL /* Available credit on the card */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment is due */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment */,
  "last_payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit card was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit card was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_card_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_type_id") REFERENCES card_types ("card_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose preferences are stored */,
  "communication_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "marketing_opt_in" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has opted in for marketing communications */,
  "preferred_branch" TEXT /* Preferred branch for in-person visits */,
  "preferred_communication_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for communication (e.g., morning, afternoon) */,
  "marketing_preferences" TEXT /* Specific marketing preferences (e.g., product categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the fraud alert (e.g., suspicious activity, large transaction) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fraud alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the fraud alert (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alerted_by" TEXT /* User who generated the alert */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the resolution of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teller, account manager, compliance officer) */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "direct_manager" TEXT /* Direct manager of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Annual interest rate for the account type */,
  "minimum_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required for the account type */,
  "minimum_deposit" REAL /* Minimum deposit required to open the account */,
  "maximum_balance" REAL /* Maximum balance allowed in the account */,
  "withdrawal_limit" REAL /* Maximum withdrawal limit per day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "card_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "card_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card type */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee for the card type */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the card type */,
  "reward_program" TEXT /* Reward program associated with the card */,
  "points_balance" REAL /* Current points balance */,
  "annual_bonus" REAL /* Annual bonus points or rewards */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the card */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., system maintenance, security update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alerted_to" TEXT /* User or department the alert was sent to */,
  "alerted_by" TEXT /* User who generated the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
